events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. Field service visit, installed operating asset. Scope equipment bonding. Observed condition: CSST gas line not bonded. Work rough-complete. Reference NEC 250.104, 250.30. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision must be fail because non-compliant/dangerous? CSST gas line not bonded is a defect, potential arc/fire hazard, non-compliant with NEC 250.104 (bonding of gas piping) and 250.30 maybe separately derived systems. So decision fail. Risk high or critical? CSST without bonding can be damaged by lightning-induced electrical energy, causing gas leaks/fire. I'd say high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80? Value not asked, 0. Sound source etc default empty strings/0. Workable empty. Findings: CSST gas line lacks required equipment bonding conductor/connection; visible defect cues: no bonding jumper/connection between CSST gas line and grounding electrode system/electrical service equipment, missing clamp/connector, exposed CSST with no bonding label. Actions: install bonding jumper per NEC 250.104, bond CSST to grounding electrode conductor or service equipment, verify continuity, inspect/test. Rationale. References NEC 250.104, 250.30. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.

CSST is particularly susceptible to lightning/arc damage if not bonded, creating fire and explosion risk. The observed absence of any bonding connection is a non-compliant installed defect.","references":["NEC 250.104","NEC 250.30"]}
